title: Looking for a SS of Man fears the darkness fr
display_title: Looking for a SS of Man fears the darkness fr
wikitext:
[]: Looking for a SS of "Man fears the darkness..." fr             Quote Post by Ozreth » Sun Aug 04, 2013 10:43 pm Heya, so I don't know if this is an ok section of the forum to ask this in but I am looking for a screenshot of Rei's "Man fears the darkness and so he scrapes away at the edges of it with fire" quote with it subtitled at the bottom. I've been looking on tons of screenshot tumblr's and whatnot but nobody seems to have this scene up anywhere. Can anybody help? Thanks :)

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Aug 05, 2013 12:12 am Well, I took this screen shot directly from the Platinum Edition DVD, if that's OK: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ozreth » Mon Aug 05, 2013 1:25 am Shinoyami65 wrote: Well, I took this screen shot directly from the Platinum Edition DVD, if that's OK: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Aug 05, 2013 2:18 am Probably. Or it might have been taken from NGE's first (bad) official translation. The Platinum Edition official translation is much better.
